description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark gable roof and a combination of light-colored brick and large glass windows on the facade. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a small lawn, and a landscaped area with shrubs and trees. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a wooden deck, a swimming pool, and additional greenery, including a large tree and privacy hedges. The side views reveal a mix of solid wall sections and expansive windows, as well as a glass-enclosed area adjacent to the pool. The property is bordered by a low retaining wall and includes both paved and grassy surfaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with conifer trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof profile, side garden, and the pool area extending toward the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a wooden deck, swimming pool, large windows, and a tree for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, retaining wall, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaped greenery.
